top.name: Runic Fortress
top.rules_text: Prepare on 6 tiles surrounding target point: each grants +2 armor to allies and deals 2 damage to enemies entering. All linked. Lasts 4 turns.

channel.name: Runic Fortress (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also reflects first spell cast into the fortified area

bottom.name: Inversion Glyph
bottom.rules_text: Prepare on tile: when triggered swap the positions of all enemies and allies within 2 tiles of the glyph.

channel.name: Inversion Glyph (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: After swapping deal 4 damage to all enemies
